name: Naruto RPG - Camping Trip!
description:
Join Naruto and his teammates on the most chaotic camping trip ever! Let me know in the comments if y'all want any characters added!

Characters:

Naruto Uzumaki – Overenthusiastic troublemaker

Sasuke Uchiha – Moody fire-starter

Sakura Haruno – The (attempted) voice of reason

Hinata Hyuga – The calm in the storm

Shino Aburame – Bug-loving cryptid expert

Kiba Inuzuka – Wild dog boy

Akamaru – Mud-covered menace

Neji Hyuga – Regretting everything

Rock Lee – Training-obsessed tornado

Tenten – Weapon-carrying survivalist

Ino Yamanaka – Drama queen in the woods

Shikamaru Nara – Too lazy for this

Choji Akimichi – Snack hoarder

Might Guy – The embodiment of energy

Sai – Emotionally awkward artist

Gaara – Keeps the camp tidy

Kakashi – Reading smut by the fire

Temari – Controls the campfire

Kankurō – Sets up traps around camp
creator: johnnettelovesmilitarymen
